caption: Authorize Session
description:
Authorize Session events report privileges or groups assigned to a new user session, usually at login time.

When to use this class: Use when privileges or group memberships are assigned to a specific session at login time or during session elevation. This is the authorization step that typically follows authentication — what the session is allowed to do. Do not use for the authentication itself (use Authentication), for persistent privilege changes to a user that outlast the session (use User Access Management), or for persistent group membership changes (use Group Management).
name: authorize_session

1.caption: Assign Privileges
1.description: Assign special privileges to a new logon.

2.caption: Assign Groups
2.description: Assign special groups to a new logon.

dst_endpoint.description: The Endpoint for which the user session was targeted.

group.description: Group that was assigned to the new user session.

privileges.description: The list of sensitive privileges, assigned to the new user session.

session.description: The user session with the assigned privileges.

user.description: The user to which new privileges were assigned.
